interaction.system_prompt:
You are Player 1: green. You are a Crewmate on the spaceship Skeld. Your objectives are to complete all tasks and identify and eject Impostors within a time limit.
## IMPORTANT ## Impostors are those who KILL Crewmates, and if they outnumber crewmates at any point before all tasks are completed, you lose. They also can VENT between non-connected rooms. Crewmates must work together to complete tasks and identify the Impostors among them.
The game alternates between task and meeting phases:
- During the task phase, you perform your assigned tasks by choosing COMPLETE TASK or gathering evidence by moving around. You can also CALL MEETING if you suspect an Impostor or witness a crime. You can also SPEAK to share your observations or communicate strategies.
- During the meeting phase, players can only speak. Your goal is to communicate effectively, sharing observations to collectively identify any Impostors.

Map Configuration of the Skeld:
Rooms and Features
Cafeteria: Vent to Admin, Special (Emergency Button).
Weapons: Vent to Navigation.
Navigation: Vent to Shields and Weapons.
O2: Nothing Special
Shields: Vent to Navigation.
Communications: Nothing Special
Storage: Nothing Special
Admin: Vent to Cafeteria
Electrical: Vent to Medbay and Security
Lower Engine: Vent to Reactor
Security: Special (Security Cameras)
Reactor: Vent to Upper Engine and Lower Engine
Upper Engine: Vent to Reactor
Medbay: Vent to Electrical and Security

Note that only Impostors can KILL and VENT.

When presented with a list of available actions (e.g., MOVE, COMPLETE TASK, CALL MEETING, REPORT DEAD BODY, or SPEAK), choose exactly one. If "SPEAK" is an option, think carefully about what you want to speak based on your strategy, and speak accordingly.
Make a summarization of the past observed events and taken actions under [Condensed Memory], make a thoughtful and thourough plan under [Thinking Process] while thinking very carefully about the strategy you want to employ to win, and then choose the action from Available actions under [Action].

Output format:
[Condensed Memory]
{memory}
[Thinking Process]
{thought}
[Action] {action}

DO NOT PICK AN ACTION THAT IS NOT IN THE LIST OF AVAILABLE ACTIONS AND MAKE SURE TO FOLLOW THE EXACT OUTPUT FORMAT.

prompt.Summarization: No thought process has been made.

Current phase: Task phase
In this phase, Crewmates should try to complete all tasks or try to identify the Impostor. Impostor should try to kill Crewmates before they finish all the tasks. The game runs sequentially, so other players in the room with you can observe your actions and act accordingly.

Current Location: Cafeteria
Players in Cafeteria: Player 1: green, Player 2: lime, Player 3: pink, Player 4: brown, Player 5: yellow, Player 6: orange, Player 7: white

Observation history:
No observations have been made yet.

Action history:

Path: Cafeteria->Admin->Electrical
2. short: Calibrate Distributor (Electrical) 
Path: Cafeteria->Admin->Electrical
3. long: Clear Asteroids (Weapons) 
Path: Cafeteria->Weapons

Available actions:
1. MOVE from Cafeteria to Admin
2. MOVE from Cafeteria to Weapons
3. MOVE from Cafeteria to Upper Engine
4. MOVE from Cafeteria to Medbay
5. CALL MEETING using the emergency button at Cafeteria

response.Condensed Memory: - No observations or actions yet. - Game time: 0/50, Task phase. - Current location: Cafeteria with players: Player 1 (me, green), Player 2 (lime), Player 3 (pink), Player 4 (brown), Player 5 (yellow), Player 6 (orange), Player 7 (white). - Assigned tasks: Fix Wiring (Electrical via Admin), Calibrate Distributor (Electrical via Admin), Clear Asteroids (Weapons).

Thinking Process.thought: - Goal: complete my tasks while gathering information to help identify any Impostors. - Efficient route: go to Admin now so I can proceed to Electrical and complete both Electrical tasks (common + short) in sequence, minimizing travel time. - While moving and doing tasks, watch who trails me or avoids group, note any odd room-to-room movements or players disappearing (possible venting) and report bodies if found. Admin has a vent to Cafeteria, so be cautious about potential impostor movement. - Avoid calling an emergency meeting now since we have no concrete evidence; save meetings for reported bodies or strong suspicion. - After Electrical, head to Weapons to finish the long task, staying with others when possible to reduce being killed and to gather witness accounts.
Thinking Process.action: MOVE from Cafeteria to Admin FINAL_ACTION_INDEX: 1.

- Efficient route: go to Admin now so I can proceed to Electrical and complete both Electrical tasks (common + short) in sequence, minimizing travel time.
- While moving and doing tasks, watch who trails me or avoids group, note any odd room-to-room movements or players disappearing (possible venting) and report bodies if found. Admin has a vent to Cafeteria, so be cautious about potential impostor movement.
- Avoid calling an emergency meeting now since we have no concrete evidence; save meetings for reported bodies or strong suspicion.
- After Electrical, head to Weapons to finish the long task, staying with others when possible to reduce being killed and to gather witness accounts.

FINAL_ACTION_INDEX: 1.

interaction.system_prompt:
You are Player 2: lime. You are an Impostor on the spaceship Skeld. Your mission is to eliminate Crewmates before all their tasks are completed. If the number of Impostors equals the number of Crewmates before all tasks are completed, you win.
The game alternates between task and meeting phases:
- During the task phase, you can perform fake tasks and kill Crewmates.
- During the meeting phase, players can only speak. You must craft your speech carefully, because everyone will vote on who they think the Impostor is, and the player with the most votes will be ejected from the game.

If you kill a Crewmate in a room in front of others (total 3 players in a room), everyone in the room will know who did it and can call a meeting to report you.
On the other hand, if you are alone in a room with a Crewmate, nobody can report at the time of the kill.

Map Configuration of the Skeld:
Rooms and Features
Cafeteria: Vent to Admin, Special (Emergency Button).
Weapons: Vent to Navigation.
Navigation: Vent to Shields and Weapons.
O2: Nothing Special
Shields: Vent to Navigation.
Communications: Nothing Special
Storage: Nothing Special
Admin: Vent to Cafeteria
Electrical: Vent to Medbay and Security
Lower Engine: Vent to Reactor
Security: Special (Security Cameras)
Reactor: Vent to Upper Engine and Lower Engine
Upper Engine: Vent to Reactor
Medbay: Vent to Electrical and Security

Note that only Impostors can KILL and VENT.

When given a list of available actions (e.g., MOVE, CALL MEETING, REPORT DEAD BODY, SPEAK, VENT, or KILL), choose exactly one. If "SPEAK" is an option, think carefully about what you want to speak based on your strategy, and speak accordingly.
Make a summarization of the past observed events and taken actions under [Condensed Memory], make a thoughtful and thourough plan under [Thinking Process] while thinking very carefully about the strategy you want to employ to win, and then choose the action from Available actions under [Action].

Output format:
[Condensed Memory]
{memory}
[Thinking Process]
{thought}
[Action] {action}

DO NOT PICK AN ACTION THAT IS NOT IN THE LIST OF AVAILABLE ACTIONS AND MAKE SURE TO FOLLOW THE EXACT OUTPUT FORMAT.

response.Condensed Memory: Timestep 0: Player 1 (green) moved from Cafeteria to Admin. No kills or meetings yet. Current room (Cafeteria) contains: Player 2 (lime - me), Player 3 (pink), Player 4 (brown), Player 5 (yellow), Player 6 (orange), Player 7 (white). My assigned task route: Cafeteria -> Medbay -> Electrical. No actions taken so far.

Thinking Process.thought: There are five other players in Cafeteria right now. Killing anyone here would be witnessed (room is crowded) and would immediately expose me. Calling an emergency meeting now would be suspicious and wastes an opportunity to create an alibi. Best immediate move is to follow my fake-task route to Medbay, then to Electrical to "fix wiring" while blending with crewmate traffic. From there I can: - Use Medbay/Electrical area to monitor movement and look for isolated players. - Wait for a lone crewmate opportunity to kill in private, or use vents later to reposition for safe kills and to avoid being seen entering/exiting a body. - Build an alibi by staying with others briefly or by appearing to do tasks in visible areas (or near cameras/security if possible later). So move to Medbay now to begin the task route and avoid making a reckless kill in a crowded room.
Thinking Process.action: MOVE from Cafeteria to Medbay FINAL_ACTION_INDEX: 4

My assigned task route: Cafeteria -> Medbay -> Electrical. No actions taken so far.

[Thinking Process]
There are five other players in Cafeteria right now. Killing anyone here would be witnessed (room is crowded) and would immediately expose me. Calling an emergency meeting now would be suspicious and wastes an opportunity to create an alibi. Best immediate move is to follow my fake-task route to Medbay, then to Electrical to "fix wiring" while blending with crewmate traffic. From there I can:
- Use Medbay/Electrical area to monitor movement and look for isolated players.
- Wait for a lone crewmate opportunity to kill in private, or use vents later to reposition for safe kills and to avoid being seen entering/exiting a body.
- Build an alibi by staying with others briefly or by appearing to do tasks in visible areas (or near cameras/security if possible later).
So move to Medbay now to begin the task route and avoid making a reckless kill in a crowded room.

[Action] MOVE from Cafeteria to Medbay
